TextRun.Text: have the potential to do sth

RichText.Text: 1. evolve into a lively celebration of love 2. look for potential partners have the potential to do sth. 3. fill the air with joy The air is filled with joy. be full of 4. the rhythmic jumping of bamboo pole dances rhythm n. 5. create an energetic atmosphere 6. with each color standing for good wishes 7. take on a new life 8. attract tourists from all over the world 9. mix ancient traditions with present activities 10. bridge the past with the present 11. the combination of old and new 12. juicy and amazingly delicious/tasty 13. without equal 14. my personal favourites

TextRun.Text: 空气中满是喜悦； 充满
4. 竹竿舞富有节奏的跳跃动作；
12. 汁水饱满，味道鲜美至极

RichText.Text: 1. 演变成/进化一场热闹的爱意庆典 2. 寻觅潜在的/可能的伙伴； 有潜力做某事 3. 处处洋溢着欢乐； 空气中满是喜悦； 充满 4. 竹竿舞富有节奏的跳跃动作； 节奏 n. 5. 营造热闹欢快的/有活力的氛围 6. 每种色彩都代表着美好祝愿 7. 呈现全新生机 8.吸引来自世界各地的游客 9.融合古老传统与现代活动 10. 连接过去与当下 11. 传统与现代的结合 12. 汁水饱满，味道鲜美至极 13. 独一无二、无与伦比 14. 我的个人的最爱的东西/人
